summary: An executive-summary board that combines the challenge, recommendation moves, and expected impact in one synthesis page.
usage_notes: Use when the page must summarize the answer to the case instead of proving one narrow point.
Keep the page as a synthesis board: challenge, recommendation, and impact should all be visible without turning the slide into a dense appendix.
avoid_notes: Do not use when the page should be led by one dominant KPI or one dominant chart only.
Do not collapse the board into a normal two-pillar strategy page if the slide still needs visible challenge framing and impact proof.
